case_title: VO THI HUE GLORIA VS PRADO ANA MARIA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VO THI HUE GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRADO ANA MARIA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO ANA MARIA PRADO RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY VO THI HUE GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO ANA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
